message:
feat: add JSONL import/restore path for Dolt corruption recovery (bd-7g2sq)

Previously, bd doctor --fix and DatabaseIntegrity explicitly skipped Dolt
backends, leaving no automated recovery path when .dolt-data/ was corrupted.
The only option was a manual procedure: rm -rf .beads/dolt && bd init.

This change adds Dolt corruption recovery that:
- Backs up the corrupted dolt directory with timestamp
- Reinitializes a fresh Dolt database via bd init --backend dolt
- Dolt bootstrap automatically imports from existing JSONL backup
- Rolls back on failure (restores corrupted dir from backup)
- Supports --force and --source flags matching SQLite recovery

Also updates doctor check messages to point to bd doctor --fix
instead of manual rm/re-init instructions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
